calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jun-17-2021 Vacated

Notice Of Application For Writ Of Attachment
Off Calendar Apr-12-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
PLAINTIFF JEAN-CHRISTOPHE KLEIN's Application For Writ Of Attachment.

No appearances. The tentative ruling is adopted as follows:

Grant. No opposition filed.

Order signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda; Not Reported. (302/EPS)

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Mar-05-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. JAEMIN CHANG, Esq. of Fox Rothschild LLP (Tel: 415-364-5551) for plaintiff Jean-Christopher Klein;
Atty. CHRISTOPHER H. HART, Esq. of Nuti Hart LLP (Tel: 510-506-7154) as movant/counsel-of-record for defendant Swyft, Inc.

HEARING RE: MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD RE: DEFENDANT SWYFT, INC.

The Court's tentative ruling instructed the parties to appear.

Matter discussed. Defense counsel is to provide plaintiff's counsel with defendant's contact information for service.

The Court conducts an unreported in camera telephone conference with defense counsel.

The Court grants the motion to be relieved as counsel.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, Email: maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/RBU)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-14-2020 Set For Trial On Jun-21-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
